strings.ACHIEVEMENT_KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_MASTERYACHI: Quam Textor, vince ludum aut oblitera super Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_TYPHOONMAST: Quam Textor, vince ludum aut oblitera super Eclipse vel altius.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_DESCRIPTION:
Textor est superstes mobilis qui sanitatem suam ad damnum utitur. Minus damni basis per gradum accipit ita sanamenta in acumulum pone ut conversionem sanitatis in damnum prosit.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Certus esto uti Tonsorem cum tot acibus quot potes. Celeriter sanguinem fluere facere potest during Insatiabilitatem.

< ! > Brutalitas est magnus modus damnum tuum augere sed sanitatem tuam cave.</color>
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_LORE:
Pallor cutis et fatigatio. Signa morbi diffundendi inter liberos curiae altae. Quam infelices sunt.

Morbus sanari potest corde artificiali sed operatio in iis fieri non potest qui ad aetatem maturem non pervenerunt. Pauci sunt satis felices ut in hoc temporis spatio cadant.

Quamquam cor artificiale morbum sanat, quotidianum idem manet. Cum frequenti custodia et periculis ruinorum, longe a domo proficisci mortem significare potest. Multi otia tardiora sicut panificium et suturam suscipiunt sed non omnes vitae suae contenti sunt.

Multi qui fugiunt examinem realitatis accipiunt. Galaxia extra curiam altam non est terra mirabilis in libris depicta. Magis fabulae trahicae similis est.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_NEEDLE_DESCRIPTION: <color=#9B3737>Acus</color> consuma saltando in aere medio te <color=#9B3737>Pulsare</color> sinens et telum emittere damnum <style=cIsDamage>40%</style> inferens.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, desiderans cosere plus quam telam tantum.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_PRIMARY_TRIM_DESCRIPTIO: <color=#9B3737>Severus</color>. Seca ante pro damnum <style=cIsDamage>120% + 200%</style>. Omnis ictus tertius damnum <style=cIsDamage>150% + 200%</style> inferit.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_SECONDARY_CLIP_DESCRIPT: Tonde pro damnum <style=cIsDamage>2x70%</style>. Tondere iter pro <color=#9B3737>Acus</color>.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_SECONDARY_PLANMAN_DESCR: <color=#9B3737>Conterere</color>. Tene ut capias hostes. Hosti in terram gravis damnum <style=cIsDamage>200% - 1000%</style> in area secundum numerum <color=#9B3737>Acuum</style> inferens. <style=cIsUtility>Refrigerium 6 secundorum</style> in eadem meta.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_SPECIAL_FIRE_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsHealth>15% HP</style>. Emitte <color=#9B3737>Symbioticam</color> forcipem damnum <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> inferentem. Leva <color=#9B3737>Symbioticas</color> forcipes ut secias pro damnum <style=cIsDamage>200%</style>.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_DESCRIP: <style=cIsHealth>15% HP</style>. Emitte <color=#9B3737>Symbioticam</color> forcipem damnum <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> inferentem. Leva <color=#9B3737>Symbioticas</color> forcipes ut secias pro damnum <style=cIsDamage>200%</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRUM: Tua arma <color=#9B3737>Symbiotica</color> tempus levandi <style=cIsUtility>1.5 secundorum</style> tantum habet.</color>
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_UTILITY_HEARTDASH_DESCR: Disco currere damnum <style=cIsDamage>250%</style> inferens et fieri <color=#9B3737>Insatiabilis</color>. Iterum mittere ut explodas, <style=cIsHealing>septem</style> in <style=cIsHealth>sanitatem</style> convertens damnum <style=cIsDamage>300% - 1200%</style> circa te secundum quantitatem conversam inferens.
strings.KENKO_SEAMSTRESS_UTILITY_PARRY_DESCRIPTI: Para <style=cIsUtility>parriam</style>. Si successum, disco currere damnum <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> inferens et <color=#9B3737>Insatibilitatem</style> acipe.
